reference: Hello, dear. I understand your concern. You should be worried, but not too much. It seems he has a hematoma. You should observe it to ensure that it does not become infected. I suggest applying ice, gently massaging with Trombophob or Pilex ointment three times a day, and applying iodine or Betadine for prophylaxis against infection. I hope I answered your question. Wishing your son good health.
text: Hello, dear. I understand your concern. You should be worried, but not too much. It seems he has a hematoma. You should observe it to ensure that it does not become infected. I suggest applying ice, gently massaging with thrombophobe or Pylex ointment three times a day, and applying iodine or betadine for prophylaxis against infection. I hope I answered your question. Wishing your son good health.
